summary: Iteration 3 — validated 2 user-reported bug fixes: (1) full 5-level Vimshottari dasha (Maha→Antar→Pratyantar→Sookshma→Pran) returned by /api/astro/dasha with proper hierarchical nesting; (2) /dashboard rewritten to show 100% real data, zero phone-frame mocks, zero hardcoded 'Chetan' text. Both bugs fully resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: astro.py _local_to_utc uses tzinfo=timezone.utc as placeholder then subtracts tz_offset — works but semantically odd; consider using ZoneInfo for clarity.
Admin user login auto-redirects to /admin; had to navigate manually to /dashboard for testing — acceptable behavior.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 new + prior iteration 2 tests still passing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified end-to-end. Backend /api/astro/dasha returns 5-level nested hierarchy validated against 2 different birth data sets (Delhi 2001 → Purva Phalguni/Venus start lord confirmed; Mumbai 1990 also valid). All hierarchy assertions (each level nested in parent, 'now' inside each window, monotonic maha_list of 12) pass. /dashboard shows BirthForm for user without birth, then real chart with 9 planets, 5 dasha level cards, 12-row Maha sequence with highlighted current row (bg-[#d4a853]/10), real Panchang (Panchami/Krishna/Shatabhisha/Ayushman/05:28/19:23), 8-planet Gochar. phone-frame count = 0 both before and after chart compute. No 'Chetan' text anywhere.

detailed_verifications.panchang_real_data: Tithi Panchami(5), Paksha Krishna, Nakshatra Shatabhisha, Yog Ayushman, Karan Vishti, Sunrise 05:28, Sunset 19:23
